I am writing to formally raise a serious complaint regarding the repeated negligence and dishonesty by the housekeeping staff assigned to our apartment, specifically Neema.

This week alone, there have been two separate instances where my room was not cleaned, despite false claims being made that the cleaning had been completed.

The first incident occurred on Thursday. When I asked Neema why my room had not been cleaned, she initially claimed that she had come and cleaned it. I informed her very clearly that this was untrue, as I had returned early from work that day and was present in my room the entire time. She then changed her explanation and stated that perhaps I had been sleeping. This explanation is completely unacceptable and false. I was not sleeping, and more importantly, this cannot even be used as an excuse because she already has access to my room keys and has repeatedly entered and cleaned the room in the past even when I was inside or unavailable.

After being confronted further, she eventually stated that “it would not happen again,” which clearly indicates that she was aware of her mistake.

This is not an isolated incident. A very similar situation occurred earlier this week as well, either on Monday or Tuesday. Once again, when questioned about why my room had not been cleaned, she initially insisted that she had cleaned it. Only after I firmly pointed out that she had not entered the room at all did she change her statement and mention that she had taken leave due to a death in her family and had attended a funeral.

At this stage, there is a very clear and repeated pattern of dishonesty. Instead of being transparent about not attending work or not completing assigned duties, excuses are repeatedly being fabricated until the matter is pressed further.

I would also like to point out that the management and staff themselves have taken my room keys from me multiple times in the past specifically for the purpose of making duplicate copies. Therefore, there is absolutely no ambiguity regarding staff access to my room.

This issue has been recurring for quite some time now, but earlier it used to happen occasionally. It has now escalated to happening multiple times within the same week, which is completely unacceptable considering we are paying for these housekeeping services.

I request the management to take this matter seriously and initiate proper corrective action immediately. This repeated negligence and dishonesty cannot continue to be ignored.
